description.value:
Due to your close friendship, your Sealed Companion will gladly give their life to save yours. While in Baryon Mode, if your life force starts to run low, they'll pick up the slack, potentially without even telling you.

At the start of each turn that you are in Baryon Mode, you must reduce your Maximum Chakra by 1d10 and the Maximum Twisted Chakra of your Sealed Beast by 4d10. Add the results together, you gain an amount of Fusion Chakra equal to half of the result, replacing any Fusion Chakra you might already have. You can spend Fusion Chakra as you would normal chakra.

If your Maximum Chakra Points are reduced below half, they are no longer reduced at the start of your turn. Instead, the Maximum Twisted Chakra of your Sealed Beast is reduced by an additional 1d10, however you only gain an amount of Fusion Chakra equal to a fourth of the result. If your Sealed Beast's Maximum Twisted Chakra is reduced to 0, you lose this Class Mod as the beast gives its life to fuel your transformation.

Maximum Chakra and Twisted Chakra lost through Last Wishes can be regained by spending Downtime to recover at a rate of 5 Maximum Chakra and Twisted Chakra per week.
